title: Sun Breathing
description: This texture pack lets you use Sun Breathing from the anime Demon Slayer.
body:
This resource pack turns many particles into effects inspired by the Sun Breathing style from the anime Demon Slayer. It is perfect for people that want to have cool effects while pvp or just in a normal world.

If you have any questions, feedback, or personal inquiries of any kind, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/kX5NjxndyY) server. There, you can use the ticket system to contact me directly.
